description_long: This kiosk features a wooden structure with a rectangular counter and a canopy roof made of white fabric, supported by wooden posts. The counter is adorned with various items such as bottles, books, and containers, suggesting it serves as a market or vendor stall. A purple cloth drapes over the front of the counter, adding a touch of color and visual interest. The kiosk is set on a tiled pavement, with a prominent wooden signpost and lantern mounted on a stone base adjacent to the stall. The overall design is rustic, with visible wood grain and simple construction, evoking a traditional market setting. The kiosk is open on all sides, allowing easy access for customers and interaction with the vendor.
description: A rustic wooden market kiosk with a white fabric canopy, purple cloth accent, and a side-mounted signpost with a lantern, set on tiled pavement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the counter with displayed items, purple cloth, and the adjacent signpost with lantern.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the kiosk, the canopy's overhang, and the signpost's structure.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the back of the counter, items on display, and the full width of the canopy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the signpost's arrow and lantern, with a partial view of the kiosk's interior.
attribute_signage_type: wooden signpost with an arrow and a hanging lantern, no visible text or symbols
attribute_roof_design: sloped canopy roof made of white fabric, supported by wooden posts, with a slight overhang
attribute_architectural_style: rustic traditional market style with simple wooden construction and fabric canopy
